nonclaims: P13-E does not prove simultaneous two-site training.
P13-E does not prove the layer1 site improves heldout quality.
P13-E does not validate HTP backprop or heterogeneous training.
promoted_claims: A second Gemma-compatible post-layer1 rank16 residual adapter site ran phone-side forward/backward/update.
Post-layer1 site passed 8 sampled finite-difference gradient checks.
G1/G3/G8/post-layer0 smoke paths passed with the patched runner.
